✨ Introducing Premium Layouts

Brainstorm freely.
Zero Cloud Tracking.

A beautifully designed, lightning-fast mind mapping tool. Your ideas are locked securely inside your own device and encrypted out-of-the-box. We collect exactly zero personal data.

Start Brainstorming Free
🔒
AES Encrypted Exports
When you export a mind map, your raw JSON files are wrapped in proprietary military-grade encryption. Nobody can read your data outside of this app.
☁️
Google Drive Sync
Upgrade to Premium to instantly sync your encrypted maps directly into your personal Google Drive. We don't host servers, so you hold all the keys.
🎨
Stunning Vector Exports
Export your creative canvases to infinite-resolution SVGs or high-density Retina PNGs to use in your presentations, wireframes, and documentation.

© 2026 Naya Solutions. Designed for ultimate privacy.
